stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What runway surface conditions are indicated by the runway state group 88229394 in a METAR?

options.a: Wet or water patches, 11-25%, 15 cm, braking action medium/good.
options.c: Wet or water patches, 26-50%, 15 cm, braking action medium/good.
options.d: Slush, 11-25%, less than 1 mm, braking action medium.
